qwen2.5-3b-q4.note: Tiny — safest first cross-machine test. Single 1.93GB file.

qwen2.5-7b-q4.note: Small real model (~4.68GB). Won't fit one low-free-RAM node -> genuine sharding.

qwen3-30b-a3b-q4.note: MoE, ~3B active/token — recommended default: fast on CPU/iGPU fleets. Single 18.6GB file.

gemma-3-27b-q4.note: Dense 27B — memory-bandwidth-bound; verify exact filename on the repo (may be split).

qwen2.5-32b-q4.note: Dense 32B — largest; the Q4_K_M is split into parts on HF (merge or point llama-server at part 1).
